bad_request.autofix_requires_server_side_clone_this_: AutoFix requires server-side clone — this repo uses local scanning mode. Run autofix locally via flyto-index.
bad_request.block_on_must_be_one_of_none_block_criti: block_on must be one of: none, block_critical, block_high, block_medium
bad_request.no_github_credentials_available_app_not_: no GitHub credentials available (App not configured and no OAuth token on file)
bad_request.parent_run_has_no_completed_recheck_phas: parent run has no completed recheck phase — nothing to retest against
bad_request.project_type_must_be_frontend_rest_api_g: project_type must be: frontend, rest_api, graphql, attack_surface
bad_request.slug_must_be_1_60_characters_lowercase_a: slug must be 1-60 characters, lowercase alphanumeric or hyphens
bad_request.this_repo_uses_local_scanning_mode_run_f: this repo uses local scanning mode — run flyto-index locally and upload results via scan-upload
bad_request.environment_must_be_production_staging_d: environment must be: production, staging, development, testing
bad_request.status_must_be_one_of_running_complete_f: status must be one of: running, complete, failed, passed, error
bad_request.metric_must_be_input_tokens_output_token: metric must be input_tokens, output_tokens, or total_tokens
bad_request.phase_must_be_one_of_baseline_probe_veri: phase must be one of: baseline, probe, verify, recheck, report
bad_request.parent_run_has_zero_proven_findings_noth: parent run has zero proven findings — nothing to retest
bad_request.finding_has_no_verified_preview_generate: finding has no verified preview; generate one first
bad_request.status_must_be_one_of_approved_rejected_: status must be one of: approved, rejected, pending
bad_request.no_github_credentials_available_for_this: no GitHub credentials available for this org
bad_request.status_must_be_open_snoozed_ignored_solv: status must be: open, snoozed, ignored, solved
bad_request.status_must_be_complete_stopped_or_error: status must be complete, stopped, or error
bad_request.name_must_be_100_characters_or_fewer: name must be 100 characters or fewer
bad_request.name_must_be_200_characters_or_fewer: name must be 200 characters or fewer
bad_request.status_must_be_succeeded_or_failed: status must be succeeded or failed
bad_request.ecosystem_must_be_npm_or_pip: ecosystem must be npm or pip

not_found.tier2_re_run_did_not_produce_this_findin: tier2 re-run did not produce this finding (file may have changed)
not_found.finding_not_found_or_already_resolved: finding not found or already resolved
not_found.no_sbom_available_run_a_scan_first: no SBOM available — run a scan first
not_found.no_ai_proposals_for_this_repo_yet: no AI proposals for this repo yet
not_found.job_not_found_in_pending_list: job not found in pending list

unprocessable.idempotency_key_reused_with_different_re: idempotency key reused with different request parameters

forbidden.only_the_organization_owner_can_delete_t: only the organization owner can delete the organization
forbidden.workspace_not_owned_by_current_user: workspace not owned by current user
forbidden.finding_does_not_belong_to_org: finding does not belong to org

conflict.manifest_already_at_the_fixed_version_no: manifest already at the fixed version — nothing to PR
conflict.resource_has_no_canonical_to_promote_aga: resource has no canonical to promote against

internal.runtime_event_rate_limit_exceeded_for_th: runtime event rate limit exceeded for this API key
internal.secrets_manager_not_configured_on_this_e: secrets manager not configured on this engine

upstream_unavailable._self: Upstream service is unreachable, please retry later
